# AI-Powered Incident Triage Assistant

This is a Java Spring Boot backend with React TypeScript frontend for AI-Powered Incident Triage Assistant following SOLID principles.

## Project Structure
- Backend: Java Spring Boot with Maven
- Frontend: React with TypeScript
- Database: H2 (in-memory for development)
- AI Logic: Simulated rule-based categorization and severity assignment
